candidate_escape_point_summary: Crew crossed runway 26 hold short and lined up on runway 26 without positive position and heading verification against cleared runway 22.
direct_actor_candidate: Crew-integrated flight crew with captain taxi control and first officer checklist/radio support
notes: Cleanest top-3 case; strongest position-verification spine; earlier stop-point candidate remains secondary.

candidate_escape_point_summary: PF disconnected autopilot, moved thrust to idle, and the A/T entered HOLD without integrated crew recognition while the approach remained high and energy-critical.
direct_actor_candidate: Crew-integrated flight crew with PF immediate control input
notes: Automation-state and stable-approach boundary remain coupled; 500 ft gate stays as alternate candidate.

candidate_escape_point_summary: Approach continued with FMC not resequenced and captain shifted to vertical speed without shared briefing, maintaining descent through MDA without effective level-off.
direct_actor_candidate: Crew-integrated flight crew with captain immediate flight-path control
notes: Strong nonprecision-approach case; earliest defensible boundary may sit at setup failure or at MDA continuation.
